title: The Mystery of Stratospheric Circulation

scenes.text: Have you ever wondered how the atmosphere keeps moving?
Stratospheric circulation plays a crucial role in weather patterns.
It's driven by temperature differences and the rotation of the Earth.
Understanding this keeps our forecasts accurate and reliable.
scenes.label: ACCURATE FORECASTS

scenes.text: Follow for the science they never taught you.

description: Atmospheric circulation influences our weather, driven by temperature and Earth's rotation. Follow for more atmospheric insights!
